blended.narrative: Lakeridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,327 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: light rain showers, highs of 38°F.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
